en:
A connected Client requires your Company to complete an Avetta Manual Audit.

Please answer the questions below, upload your Health and Safety Manual (including all procedures), review the requirements, and click SUBMIT when you are ready.

Once submitted, your documents will be audited by an Avetta Safety Professional to verify compliance with applicable requirements.
zh_CN:
您已连接的客户要求贵公司完成 Avetta 手册审计。

请回答以下问题，上传您的健康和安全手册（包括所有程序），查看要求，并在准备就绪后点击“提交”。

提交后，您的文档将由 Avetta 安全专业人员审计，以检验是否符合适用的要求。

en: NOTE: If you need to upload additional documents, please refer back to this section.
zh_CN: 注意：如果您需要上传其他文档，请参阅本节。

en: ### Please Identify the Work Type(s) that align most closely with your specialty or scope of services. Selecting appropriate Work Types allows us to build a custom audit tailored to your Company's operations.
zh_CN: ### 请确定与您的专业或服务范围最密切相关的工作类型。 选择适当的工作类型，以便我们为贵公司的业务定制审计方案。
物流服务 - 包装和运输
起重机租赁服务与维护

en: Building Construction - Drywall, Framing, Maintenance, Repair
zh_CN: 建筑施工 - 干墙、框架、维护、修理
环卫工程师/清洁/废物处理

en:
Please Note: Your selection(s) should include all services performed by your Company, rather than a specific Client or site.

Each Work Type selection will add additional audit requirements for your review and compliance.
zh_CN:
请注意：您的选择应包括贵公司提供的所有服务，而非针对特定的客户或站点。

每种工作类型的选择都会为您的审查和合规添加额外的审计要求。
石油上游行业/勘探与生产
施工（设计与管理） - 仅限英国
预制建筑（结构）/建筑饰面
工业设备租赁/销售/出租
可再生能源/太阳能/风能/水电
爆破工/炸药专家/烟火工

en:
### Upload your Safety and Health Manual File Requirements:
  • Comprehensive Safety and Health procedure(s)
  • Review/revision date within the last three years
  • PDF or Word version
  • Only 10 documents at a time
  • Not client, project, or site specific
  • If you are a Small Employer in accordance with jurisdictional requirements and DO NOT use subcontractors, please upload a letter indicating this
  • If you are a Sole Owner and DO NOT employ any other personnel or use subcontractors, please upload a letter indicating this

    • Need help? Visit our Help Center for additional guidance and support.
zh_CN:
### 上传您的《安全和健康手册》 文件要求：
  • 全面的安全和健康程序
  • 最近三年内的审查/修订日期
  • PDF 或 Word 版本
  • 一次只能上传 10 份文档
  • 不针对特定客户、项目或站点
  • 如果根据司法辖区要求，您是小型雇主，且未使用任何分包商，请上传一封说明函
  • 如果您是独立经营者，且未雇用任何其他人员或未使用分包商，请上传一封说明函

    • 需要帮助吗？请访问我们的帮助中心获取更多指导和支持。

en:
This upload should contain all procedures combined into one file (.pdf, .doc). If you are having trouble combining your procedures into one file, please contact Supplier Success for assistance. If you are a Sole Owner in accordance with jurisdictional requirements and do not employ any other personnel or subcontractors, please upload a letter indicating this. If you are a Small Employer in accordance with jurisdictional requirements and do not employ any subcontractors, please upload a letter indicating this. The most current and comprehensive version of your Safety and Health procedure(s) will be required to complete the Manual Audit. A table of contents alone will not be sufficient, as the Auditor will need to review the entire text of your procedures.

Upload times vary depending on the file size and connection speeds.
zh_CN:
本次上传应将所有程序合并为一个文件（.pdf、.doc）。如果您无法顺利地将程序合并为一个文件，请联系供应商成功团队以寻求帮助。 如果根据司法辖区要求，您是独立经营者，且未雇用任何其他人员或分包商，请上传一封说明函。 如果根据司法辖区要求，您是小型雇主，且未雇用任何分包商，请上传一封说明函。 为完成手册审计，您需要提供最新版和最全面的安全和健康程序。 仅提供目录是不够的，审计员需要查看程序的完整文本。

上传时间取决于文件大小和连接速度。

en:
Please upload ONE file containing your company's entire Safety and Health Manual (including all procedures). The file must be in PDF or Word version. 

If your company does not have an electronic copy, please contact Supplier Success for assistance. 
 
If your company is not required by jurisdictional regulations to maintain a written Safety and Health procedure, please upload a letter indicating this.
zh_CN:
请上传一个包含贵公司完整版《安全和健康手册》（包括所有程序）的文件。文件必须为 PDF 或 Word 版本。

如果贵公司没有电子版，请联系供应商成功团队以寻求帮助。
 
如果司法辖区的法规不要求贵公司维护书面的安全和健康程序，请上传一封说明函。

zh_CN: 请包括符合司法辖区要求的针对接触空气中砷浓度员工的适用培训程序。

zh_CN: 程序是否包括根据司法辖区要求，降低/维持砷接触水平在适用限值以下的工程控制和工作实践？

zh_CN: 请包括根据司法辖区要求，定义与石棉接触管理相关合格人员的角色和职责的程序。

zh_CN: 程序是否包括针对不同级别的石棉相关工作（包括清除）的具体控制方法？

zh_CN: 请包括符合司法辖区要求的针对石棉相关工作的具体控制方法的程序。

en: Please provide a Health & Safety Management Plan that addresses consultation, cooperation and coordination arrangements used to manage the risks associated with consultation and management of change. The plan should include arrangements for collecting, assessing, monitoring and training in order to manage risk.
zh_CN: 请提供一份健康和安全管理计划，阐述旨在管理与协商和变更管理相关风险的协商、合作和协调安排。该计划应包括出于风险管理的收集、评估、监测和培训安排。

en: Does the Health and Safety Management Plan include arrangements for consultation, cooperation and coordination between multiple supply chain entities?
zh_CN: 健康和安全管理计划是否包括多个供应链实体之间的协商、合作和协调安排？

en: Does the Health & Safety Management Plan include arrangements for consultation, cooperation and coordination between other duty holders working as part of a contractual chain?
zh_CN: 健康和安全管理计划是否包括作为合同链一部分的其他责任人之间的协商、合作和协调安排？

en: Please provide a Health & Safety Management that addresses consultation, cooperation and coordination arrangements when working with other duty holders. The plan should address change management and how these are communicated within the contractual chain across consultation and management of change.
zh_CN: 请提供一份健康和安全管理计划，说明与其他责任人合作时的协商、合作和协调安排。该计划应阐述变更管理以及如何在合同链内就协商和变更管理进行沟通。

en: Does the Health & Safety Management plan include consultation with employees who are (or are likely to be) directly affected by a health and safety matter?
zh_CN: 健康和安全管理计划是否包括与受到（或可能受到）健康和安全问题直接影响的员工之间的协商？

en: Please provide a Health & Safety Management Plan that addresses consultation and coordination with employees regarding health and safety matters across the organization (i.e. Health and Safety Committees, unions or other agreed arrangements).
zh_CN: 请提供一份健康和安全管理计划，阐述针对整个组织的健康和安全问题与员工之间的协商和协调安排（即健康与安全委员会、工会或其他商定的安排）。

en: Under current WHS (Mines) Regulations, a contractor must not perform mining operations unless they prepare a health and safety management plan and provide a copy to the mine operator.
zh_CN: 根据现行的 WHS（采矿）法规，承包商必须制定健康和安全管理计划并向矿山经营者提供副本，否则不得进行采矿作业。

en: Does the plan address providing a copy of to the mining operator?
zh_CN: 计划是否涉及向采矿经营者提供副本？

en: Does the plan address it is reviewed every  three years at minimum?
zh_CN: 计划是否规定至少每三年审查一次？

en: All PCBUs operating on a mine site must ensure the Mine Safety Management Plan is updated at least every three years to remain responsive to changing health and safety risks and issues, including legal updates, new equipment/processes, new staff, changes in premises, and incidents.
zh_CN: 在矿区经营的所有 PCBU 必须确保至少每三年更新一次采矿安全管理计划，以应对不断变化的健康和安全风险和问题，包括法律更新、新设备/流程、新员工、场所变化和事件。

en: Does the plan include a description of current mining operations?
zh_CN: 计划是否包括当前采矿作业的说明？

en: The description should include details about the location, nature, size, and complexity of the mining operations (e.g., underground or open pit, processing operations).
zh_CN: 说明应包括采矿作业的地点、性质、规模和复杂程度等详细信息（如地下或露天开采、加工作业）。

en: The plan should outline the commitment of leadership to health and safety, as well as describe the approach taken to ensure a safe working environment. Describe how leadership ensures a safe working environment through clear expectations, resource allocation, and active promotion of safety practices.
zh_CN: 计划应概述领导层对健康和安全的承诺，并说明为确保安全的工作环境所采取的方法。说明领导层如何通过明确的期望、资源分配和积极推广安全实践来确保安全的工作环境。

en: Does the plan address leadership commitment to health and safety?
zh_CN: 计划是否涉及领导层对健康和安全的承诺？

en: The plan should encompass several critical components related to full scope of services. Include principal mining hazard management plan, health management plan, emergency plan, and, where applicable, radiation management plan, radioactive waste management plan, or underground ventilation control plan.
zh_CN: 计划应包括与完整服务范围相关的几个关键组成部分。 包括主要采矿危害管理计划、健康管理计划、应急计划，以及适用的辐射管理计划、放射性废物管理计划或地下通风控制计划。

en: Does the plan include applicable plans based on the full scope of services?
zh_CN: 计划是否包括基于完整服务范围的适用计划？

en: Does the plan address roles and responsibilities?
zh_CN: 计划是否涉及角色和职责？

en: The plan should include information about the names, positions, and health and safety responsibilities of all individuals at the workplace whose roles involve specific health and safety responsibilities related to the project.
zh_CN: 计划应包括工作场所中所有承担与项目相关的特定健康和安全职责的人员的姓名、岗位以及健康和安全职责的信息。

en: Does the plan address controls for monitoring WHS Mine Regulations?
zh_CN: 计划是否涉及监测 WHS 采矿法规的控制措施？

en: Outline the process for managing legislative changes. Major updates may require risk assessments and extensive consultation, while minor updates may involve updating procedures and communicating the changes.
zh_CN: 概述管理立法变更的程序。重大更新可能需要进行风险评估和广泛征集意见，而小型更新可能涉及更新程序和传达变更。

en: Include health surveillance, baseline health checks, periodic monitoring, and specific hazard monitoring (chemical, noise, dust, radiation, ergonomic, biological exposure).
zh_CN: 包括健康监测、基线健康检查、定期监测和特定危害监测（化学、噪音、粉尘、辐射、人体工程学、生物接触）。

en: Does the plan address health monitoring of exposed workers?
zh_CN: 计划是否涉及对接触危害物质的员工的健康监测？

en: A person conducting a business or undertaking (PCBU) must notify their WHS regulator when serious injuries, illnesses and dangerous incidents occur. Ensure procedures are in place for promptly notifying responsible individuals and, if required, the WHS regulator about serious injuries, illnesses, and dangerous incidents.
zh_CN: 当发生严重伤害、疾病和危险事件时，PCBU 必须通知其 WHS 监管机构。确保制定程序，以便及时将有关严重伤害、疾病和危险事件的信息通知负责人，并在必要时通知 WHS 监管机构。

en: Does the plan address incident notification and reporting?
zh_CN: 计划是否涉及事件通知和报告？

en:
If a notifiable incident occurs, the PCBU must keep a copy of the risk assessment, WHS management plan and/or Safe Work Method Statement (SWMS) after the incident occurs.
The Safety Management Plan must be kept up to date and accessible, with controls for document development and issuance. This can be done by setting controls for the development and issue of any documents.
zh_CN:
如果发生了应通报的事件，PCBU 必须在事件发生后保留风险评估、WHS 管理计划和/或安全工作方法声明（SWMS）的副本。
安全管理计划必须保持最新且易于查阅，并包含文档编制和发布的控制措施。为此，可设置针对任何文档编制和发布的控制措施。

en: Does the plan address record retention?
zh_CN: 计划是否涉及记录保留问题？

en: Does the plan address a management of change process?
zh_CN: 计划是否涉及变更流程的管理？

en: Include consultation, cooperation, and coordination arrangements with other duty holders and address how changes are communicated within the contractual chain across mining projects.
zh_CN: 包括与其他责任人的协商、合作和协调安排，并涉及在整个采矿项目的合同链中传达变更的方式。

en: Please include the procedure addressing Asbestos Awareness. Employees whose tasks involve the use or handling of products, such as insulation, floor tiles, building materials, or vehicle brakes and clutches are at risk of exposure to asbestos.
zh_CN: 请包括有关石棉安全知识的程序。工作任务涉及使用或处理隔热材料、地板砖、建筑材料或车辆制动器和离合器等产品的员工有接触石棉的风险。

en: Does the procedure include an Asbestos Awareness statement?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括石棉安全知识声明？

en: Does the procedure include a Benzene Awareness statement?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括苯安全知识声明？

en: Please include the procedure addressing Benzene Awareness. Employees whose tasks involve the use or handling of petroleum-based products, lubricants, plastics, rubbers, or dyes are at risk of exposure to benzene.
zh_CN: 请包括有关苯安全知识的程序。工作任务涉及使用或处理石油基产品、润滑剂、塑料、橡胶或染料的员工有接触苯的风险。

en: Does the procedure include a Hydrogen Sulfide (H2S) Awareness statement?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括硫化氢（H2S）安全知识声明？

en: Please include the procedure addressing Hydrogen Sulfide (H2S) Awareness. Employees whose tasks involve work with sewers, pits, wells (including water, oil, and gas) or certain petroleum-based products, are at risk of exposure to hydrogen sulfide.
zh_CN: 请包括有关硫化氢（H2S）安全知识的程序。工作任务涉及下水道、矿井、井（包括水、油和气）或特定石油基产品的员工有接触硫化氢的风险。

en: Does the procedure include a Lead Awareness statement?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括铅安全知识声明？

en: Please include the procedure addressing Lead Awareness. Employees whose tasks involve work with metal, paint, plumbing, HVACR, electrical, building modification, demolition, repair, or certain petroleum-based products are at risk of exposure to lead.
zh_CN: 请包括有关铅安全知识的程序。工作任务涉及金属、油漆、管道、暖通空调与制冷（HVACR）、电气、建筑改造、拆除、维修或特定石油基产品的员工有接触铅的风险。

en: Does the procedure include an Arsenic Awareness statement?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括砷安全知识声明？

en: Please include the procedure addressing Arsenic Awareness. Employees whose tasks involve work with paints, wood preservatives, agricultural chemicals, or certain manufactured glass products are at risk of exposure to arsenic.
zh_CN: 请包括有关砷安全知识的程序。从事与油漆、木材防腐剂、农用化学品或特定玻璃制成品相关工作的员工有接触砷的风险。

en: Does the procedure include training for employees who are exposed to airborne concentrations of benzene?

en: Please include the procedure that specifies training requirements for electrically qualified persons. Employees who perform electrical work and face increased risk of electrical incident should be trained in safety-related work practices applicable to their respective job assignments. Qualified employees must possess the necessary skills to distinguish live parts, determine the nominal voltage of equipment, and calculate clearance distances.
zh_CN: 请包括明确规定电气合格人员培训要求的程序。从事电气工作并面临更高电气事件风险的员工，应接受适用于其工作任务的安全相关工作实践培训。合格的员工必须具备区分带电部件、确定设备标称电压和计算间隙距离的必要技能。

If effective communication is not practical, the employer must ensure that other means of physical verification are made.

en: Please include the procedure that addresses employee training and access to information regarding hearing protection. The employer should provide training for all employees exposed to action level noise in accordance with jurisdictional requirements.

zh_CN: 请包括根据司法辖区要求监测噪音水平、接触限值或其他阈值的程序。

en: Please include the procedure that addresses audiometric testing in accordance with jurisdictional requirements.  Procedures should provide for the establishment of a baseline audiogram and recurring testing for each exposed employee, as applicable.
zh_CN: 请包括符合司法辖区要求的听力测试程序。 程序应规定构建基准听力图，并对所有接触噪音的员工进行定期测试（如适用）。

en: Does the procedure include workplace hazard assessments to determine where personal protective equipment is necessary?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括工作场所危害评估，以确定哪些地方需要个人防护装备？

en: Please include the procedure that addresses the proper selection of personal protective equipment based on workplace hazard assessments.
zh_CN: 请包括根据工作场所危害评估，正确选择个人防护装备的程序。

en: Please include the procedure that addresses training for all employees required to use personal protective equipment, in accordance with jurisdictional requirements. Training should address proper care, maintenance, useful life, and disposal of expendable PPE. Retraining should occur when the workplace changes, earlier training is made obsolete, the type of PPE changes, or when the employee demonstrates insufficient understanding.
zh_CN: 请包括根据司法辖区要求，对所有需要使用个人防护装备的员工进行培训的程序。培训应涉及消耗性个人防护装备（PPE）的正确保养、维护、使用寿命和处置。当工作场所改变、先前的培训已过时、个人防护装备（PPE）类型改变或员工对培训内容理解不足时，应进行再培训。

en: Does the procedure include training and/or retraining for employees required to use personal protective equipment?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括对需要使用个人防护装备的员工进行培训和/或再培训？

en: Please include the procedure that addresses how personal protective equipment is provided, inspected, used, and maintained in a sanitary and reliable condition, in accordance with jurisdictional requirements. Procedures should apply to both employer issued and employee owned equipment, where permitted by jurisdictional requirements.
zh_CN: 请包括根据司法辖区要求，提供、检查、使用和维护个人防护装备，并确保其卫生可靠的程序。在司法辖区要求允许的情况下，程序应适用于雇主发放的设备和员工拥有的装备。

en: Does the procedure include that personal protective equipment will be provided, inspected, used, and maintained in a sanitary and reliable condition, regardless of ownership?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括个人防护装备（无论归谁所有）的提供、检查、使用和维护，并确保其卫生可靠？

en: Does the procedure include Process Safety Management (PSM) and contract employer responsibilities?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括过程安全管理（PSM）和合同雇主责任？

en: Please include the procedure that addresses contract employer responsibilities in regard to Process Safety Management (PSM). Contract employers should ensure that each employee is trained in the work practices relevant to their assigned tasks.
zh_CN: 请包括涉及合同雇主在过程安全管理（PSM）方面的职责的程序。合同雇主应确保每位员工都接受过与其分配任务相关的工作实践培训。

en: Does the procedure include PSM site-specific hazards and emergency action provisions?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括过程安全管理（PSM）站点特定的危害和应急行动规定？

en: Please include the procedure that addresses hazards and emergency action provisions associated with each job function, task, or PSM site. Contract employers should ensure that each employee is instructed in potential hazards such as fire, explosion, toxic release, and other foreseeable emergencies.
zh_CN: 请包括与每个工作职能、任务或过程安全管理（PSM）站点相关的危害和应急行动规定的程序。合同雇主应确保每位员工都了解火灾、爆炸、有毒物质泄漏和其他可预见的紧急情况等潜在危害。

en: Does the procedure include training for employees associated with PSM sites?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括对过程安全管理（PSM）站点相关员工的培训？

en: Please include the procedure that addresses how PSM training will be conducted and documented. Contract employers should document that each employee has received and understood the required training. Documentation should include employee identities, dates of training, and means of assessing employee understanding.
zh_CN: 请包括如何执行和记录过程安全管理（PSM）培训的程序。合同雇主应记录每位员工是否已接受并理解所需的培训。文件应包括员工身份、培训日期和评估员工理解程度的方法。

en: Does the procedure include Management of Change (MOC)?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括变更管理（MOC）？

en: Please include the procedure that addresses Management of Change (MOC) in relation to PSM. Management of change applies where changes to jobs or processes create additional exposures or hazards.
zh_CN: 请包括过程安全管理（PSM）变更管理（MOC）的程序。变更管理适用于因工作或流程的变更造成额外接触或危害的情况。

en: Please include the procedure that addresses safety performance evaluations for employees associated with PSM sites.
zh_CN: 请包括过程安全管理（PSM）站点相关员工的安全绩效评估程序。

en: Does the procedure include employee evaluation?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括员工评估？

en: Please include the procedure that addresses the identification, assessment, and control of reasonably foreseeable psychosocial risks in the workplace. Examples include violence, aggression, bullying, or sexual harassment.
zh_CN: 请包括识别、评估和控制工作场所中合理可预见的社会心理风险的程序。例如暴力、攻击、欺凌或性骚扰。

en: Does the procedure include a consistent methodology for identifying, assessing, and controlling reasonably foreseeable psychosocial risks in the workplace?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括识别、评估和控制工作场所中合理可预见的社会心理风险的一致方法？

en: Does the procedure include effective consultation with employees to improve decision-making and work design in order to eliminate or minimize the risks of psychological harm?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括为消除或最小化社会心理伤害风险，与员工有效协商以改进决策和工作设计？

en: Please include the procedure that addresses effective consultation with employees who are (or are likely to be) affected by workplace psychosocial hazards.
zh_CN: 请包括与受到（或可能受到）工作场所社会心理危害影响的员工有效协商的程序。

en: Does the procedure outline a reliable mechanism for reporting, investigating, and responding to psychosocial incidents, hazards, and risks in a timely manner?
zh_CN: 程序是否概述及时报告、调查和应对社会心理事件、危害和风险的可靠机制？

en: Please include the procedure that addresses a reliable mechanism for reviewing employee reports, complaints (including informal complaints or grievances) which may identify new psychosocial hazards or risks that are not adequately controlled.
zh_CN: 请包括关于审查员工报告、投诉（包括非正式投诉或抱怨）的可靠机制的程序，通过这些报告或投诉可能会识别出未得到充分控制的新的社会心理危害或风险。

en: Please include the procedure that addresses training for employees, managers, supervisors, and leaders who are involved in or affected by the psychosocial risk management process.
zh_CN: 请包括对参与或受社会心理风险管理过程影响的员工、经理、主管和领导者进行培训的程序。

en: Does the procedure include training employees on their rights, roles, and responsibilities in effectively managing psychosocial hazards in the workplace?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括对员工进行培训，使其了解自身在有效管理工作场所社会心理危害方面的权利、角色和职责？

en: Please include the procedure that addresses the retention of records associated with the psychosocial risk management process. Examples include training, consultations, hazard assessments, reporting, and monitoring of established control measures.
zh_CN: 请包括与社会心理风险管理过程相关的记录的保留程序。例如培训、咨询、危害评估、报告和对既定控制措施的监测。

en: Does the procedure include the retention of records associated with the psychosocial risk management process and its outcomes?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括与社会心理风险管理过程和结果相关的记录的保留？

en: Does the procedure include training for employees who are exposed to RF/EME?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括对接触 RF/EME 的员工的培训？

en: Please include the procedure that addresses training for employees exposed to RF/EME in accordance with jurisdictional requirements. Employers should ensure that all exposed employees are trained on RF/EME hazards and controls.
zh_CN: 请包括根据司法辖区要求，对接触 RF/EME 的员工进行培训的程序。雇主应确保所有接触 RF/EME 的员工均接受过有关 RF/EME 危害和控制措施的培训。

en: Please include the procedure that addresses the identification and periodic surveillance of RF/EME hazards by competent personnel who can effectively assess RF/EME exposures, in accordance with jurisdictional requirements.
zh_CN: 请包括根据司法辖区要求，有效评估 RF/EME 接触水平的合格人员识别和定期监测 RF/EME 危害的程序。

en: Does the procedure include RF/EME exposure identification and periodic surveillance by competent personnel?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括合格人员识别和定期监测 RF/EME 接触水平？

en: Does the procedure include assignment of responsibilities, authority, and resources associated with RF/EME protection?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括与 RF/EME 保护相关的职责、权限和资源的分配？

en: Please include the procedure that addresses the assignment of responsibilities, including the necessary authority and resources associated with RF/EME protection.
zh_CN: 请包括职责分配的程序，包括与 RF/EME 保护相关的必要权限和资源。

en: Please include the procedure that addresses the use of RF/EME source equipment that meets applicable safety standards and jurisdictional requirements. Manufacturers of RF/EME source equipment are responsible for making equipment that complies with applicable standards, and employers are responsible for providing information to their employees on the hazards of operating and servicing the equipment.
zh_CN: 请包括使用符合适用安全标准和司法辖区要求的 RF/EME 源设备的程序。RF/EME 源设备制造商有责任制造符合适用标准的设备，而雇主则有责任向员工提供有关操作和维修设备的危害的信息。

en: Does the procedure include the use of RF/EME source equipment that meets applicable jurisdictional requirements?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括使用符合适用司法辖区要求的 RF/EME 源设备？

en: Please include the procedure that addresses the identification of RF/EME hazard areas and the implementation of controls to reduce RF/EME exposures to acceptable levels, in accordance with applicable guidelines and jurisdictional requirements.
zh_CN: 请包括根据适用指南和司法辖区要求，识别 RF/EME 危害区域和实施控制措施将 RF/EME 接触水平降至可接受水平的程序。

en: Does the procedure include the identification of RF/EME hazard areas and implementation of controls to reduce exposure in accordance with jurisdictional requirements?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括根据司法辖区要求，识别 RF/EME 危害区域，并实施控制措施以降低接触水平？

en: Does the procedure include periodic reviews of effectiveness to identify and resolve deficiencies related to RF/EME protection?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括对有效性的定期审查，以识别和解决与 RF/EME 保护相关的缺陷？

en: Please include the procedure that addresses periodic reviews of effectiveness to identify and resolve deficiencies related to RF/EME protection, in accordance with jurisdictional requirements.
zh_CN: 请包括根据司法辖区要求，定期审查有效性的程序，以便识别和解决与 RF/EME 保护相关的缺陷。

en: Does the procedure include RF/EME monitoring or engineering controls where known or potential exposure to RF/EME exists?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括在已知或潜在接触 RF/EME 的地方使用 RF/EME 监测或工程控制？

en: Please include the procedure that addresses the use of monitoring or engineering controls to detect or evaluate known or potential exposures to RF/EME in accordance with jurisdictional requirements.
zh_CN: 请包括根据司法辖区要求，使用监测或工程控制来检测或评估 RF/EME 已知或潜在接触的程序。

**IMPORTANT: This should be defined in a written procedure. Suppliers should not upload actual medical record data.**

**重要提示：这应该在书面程序中定义。供应商不应上传实际的医疗记录数据。**

**重要提示：这应该在书面程序中定义。供应商不应上传实际的医疗记录数据。**

en: Does the procedure include employee access to records within a reasonable time frame?
zh_CN: 程序是否包括员工在合理时限内访问记录？

en:
Please include the procedure that addresses employee access to medical records in a reasonable time frame, in accordance with jurisdictional requirements.
**IMPORTANT: This should be defined in a written procedure. Suppliers should not upload actual medical record data.**
zh_CN:
请包括根据司法辖区要求，说明员工在合理时限内访问医疗记录的程序。
**重要提示：这应该在书面程序中定义。供应商不应上传实际的医疗记录数据。**
